items.title: "We didn't start this war!" says guy who started war.
items.dek: I think this quote will come back again and again and again. submitted by /u/Troopshipsonfire [link] [comments]

items.title: Israel strikes Lebanon after Hezbollah rocket fire as Iran conflict widens
items.dek: Lebanon's health ministry says 31 people were killed by Israeli strikes, while there are no reports of casualties in Israel.
items.body: Lebanon's health ministry says 31 people were killed by Israeli strikes, while there are no reports of casualties in Israel.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Lost Rembrandt painting rediscovered after 65 years
items.dek: The painting, created by the Dutch master in 1633, had disappeared after being sold in 1961.
items.body: The painting, created by the Dutch master in 1633, had disappeared after being sold in 1961.
